description_long: This sconce features a sleek, cylindrical body suspended from a thin rod attached to a circular ceiling mount. The main body is smooth and appears to be made of metal, with a subtle matte finish that gives it a modern, understated look. The bottom of the cylinder is open, likely allowing light to be cast downward in a focused beam. The design is minimalistic, with no visible seams, fasteners, or decorative embellishments, emphasizing clean lines and functional form. The color is a uniform light gray or white, contributing to its contemporary aesthetic. This fixture would blend seamlessly into modern urban environments, such as cafes, offices, or residential entryways.
description: A modern, cylindrical ceiling-mounted sconce with a smooth, matte finish and a minimalist design in light gray or white.
description_view_0: The sconce is seen from a slight angle, revealing the cylindrical body and the open bottom, with the rod and ceiling mount clearly visible.
description_view_1: A direct front view shows the full length of the cylinder and the rod, with the open end of the sconce facing forward.
description_view_2: This angled view mirrors view 0 but from the opposite side, again highlighting the cylindrical form and open bottom.
description_view_3: A direct bottom-up view into the open end of the cylinder, emphasizing the hollow interior and the symmetry of the design.
attribute_fixture_design: Minimalist and modern, with a clean cylindrical form and no visible ornamentation, emphasizing simplicity and function.
